steps.title: Identify the decisive signal
steps.content: The passage defines soft vs. hard commodities by origin (grown/farmed vs. mined/drilled), not durability. This rule is the key to the transition that follows.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the transition
steps.content:
“By this definition” directly applies the rule: since pine lumber is grown, it's soft by definition, which explains why it counts as soft despite being durable.

The other choices offer a partial reason, claim an exception where none exists, or misidentify the operation.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
